narrative:
Locust Grove (precinct in Adams County) has 738 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.2 percentage points.
